# Kintsugi & Co. Artisanal Ceramics

Welcome to Kintsugi & Co., a boutique ceramics studio dedicated to handcrafted stoneware, porcelain vessels, and traditional wood-fired glazes.

## Explore Our Studio

- **[Wheel-Thrown Collection](collection/wheel-thrown-vessels.md)**: Discover our signature stoneware vases and tea sets.
- **[Ceramics Care Guide](care-guide.md)**: Essential advice on maintaining hand-thrown pottery.
- **[Studio Journal](journal/2026-07-15-glazing-techniques.md)**: Read about our latest reduction firing and glaze formulation process.
